title: INNER JOIN on witnesses in spendable_notes is a correctness constraint
description: spendable_notes() uses JOIN witnesses w ON n.note_id = w.note_id. A contributor may suggest LEFT JOIN to 'also return notes whose witness hasn't arrived yet.' Do not do that. A note without a witness cannot produce a valid Merkle inclusion proof. Passing such a note to build_shielded_tx would succeed the note-reconstruction step but fail in add_sapling_spend with an anchor mismatch or cause undefined anchor computation. The INNER JOIN is not an optimization — it is a correctness filter. Notes with no witness are structurally unspendable and must not appear in the result.
